title: poa nemoralis var. caespitosa
intro: Poa nemoralis var. caespitosa is a grass species, commonly known as Wood Meadow-grass, which is a variant of the Wood Meadow-grass plant (Poa nemoralis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis var. caespitosa include its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
